name: OCULAR THERAPEUTIX, INC
business: OCULAR THERAPEUTIX is an integrated biopharmaceutical company focused on retinal diseases, with commercial product DEXTENZA (a corticosteroid insert for ocular inflammation/pain and allergic conjunctivitis) and lead investigational candidate AXPAXLI (axitinib intravitreal hydrogel) for wet age-related macular degeneration and diabetic retinal disease. The company also has product candidate OTX-TIC for glaucoma. It sells primarily to ambulatory surgery centers, hospital outpatient departments, and physicians' offices in the United States.

exposures.sentence: We are an integrated biopharmaceutical company committed to redefining the retina experience.

catalysts.event: Presentation of Week 52 results from SOL-1 Phase 3 trial at the 49th Macula Society Annual Meeting
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present Week 52 results for the SOL-1 trial at the 49th Macula Society Annual Meeting, taking place between February 25 28, 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from SOL-R Phase 3 trial expected
catalysts.sentence: We expect topline data from the SOL-R trial to be available in the first quarter of 2027, an acceleration from our previous guidance of the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of SOL-X long-term safety extension trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate, in the second quarter of 2026, a multi-center, open-label long-term safety extension clinical trial, which we refer to as the SOL-X trial, to evaluate subjects who have completed their two-year safety follow-up visits in either the SOL-1 or SOL-R trials for an additional three years.

catalysts.event: First subject randomized in HELIOS-3 trial
catalysts.sentence: On November 24, 2025, we announced that the first subject in the HELIOS-3 trial was randomized.

tamClaims.claim: The exudative retinal diseases market in the aggregate is estimated to include up to 8.3 million patients in the United States by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: AXPAXLI is seeking to address segments of the exudative retinal diseases market, which in the aggregate is estimated to include up to 8.3 million patients in the United States by 2030 and accounted for approximately $9.4 billion in U.S. annual estimated revenues in 2025, according to the Market Scope 2025 Exudative Retinal Disease Pharmaceuticals Report, published in October 2025, or the Market Scope 2025 Retina Report.

tamClaims.claim: The market for exudative retinal diseases accounted for approximately $9.4 billion in U.S. annual estimated revenues in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: AXPAXLI is seeking to address segments of the exudative retinal diseases market, which in the aggregate is estimated to include up to 8.3 million patients in the United States by 2030 and accounted for approximately $9.4 billion in U.S. annual estimated revenues in 2025, according to the Market Scope 2025 Exudative Retinal Disease Pharmaceuticals Report, published in October 2025, or the Market Scope 2025 Retina Report.

tamClaims.claim: There were 6.3 million cases of NPDR and 1.7 million cases of DME in the United States in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there were 6.3 million cases of NPDR and 1.7 million cases of DME in the United States in 2025 according to the Market Scope 2025 Retina Report, growing at a CAGR of 1.7% and 1.8%, respectively, through 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The global market for glaucoma was estimated at $4.2 billion in 2024 with the U.S. market representing $1.6 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Market Scope 2024 Glaucoma Report, the global market for glaucoma was estimated at $4.2 billion in 2024 with the U.S. market representing $1.6 billion.
